prestazioni: Engine swap to a J35Y6 (3.5L V6 from the 2016+ Honda Pilot) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger, paired with a PRL Motorsports J35A/J35Y billet aluminum intake manifold and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system by Injen Technology

Full bolt-on upgrade including a Skunk2 Alpha Series J35 throttle body, a custom 3-inch exhaust system with a Borla Atak muffler and Vibrant Performance 1799 high-flow catalytic converters, and a Hondata KPro V4 standalone ECU tuned specifically for the J35Y6 with E85 flex-fuel capability

Suspension overhaul with KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable), Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension for the J35Y6-powered Passport’s unique subframe geometry
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny V3 Passport-specific kit, including carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in a matte Honda Racing White (NH-578M) with gloss black accents

OEM+ aggressive styling with a Seibon Carbon fiber hood (custom-made for the Passport’s J35Y6 engine bay) and a custom front bumper lip from Varis, paired with a set of Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (20x10.5 +25 front, 20x11.5 +30 rear) in a matte gunmetal finish

Interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (custom-mounted for the Passport’s chassis), a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub, and a full custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK, finished in Alcantara with red stitching to match the Honda Sensing red interior lighting
